creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 187299
Update cacti to 1.1.26

Update cacti to 1.1.26 - this is a security bugfix release which addresses:

  CVE-2017-15194 - Path-Based Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) 

Due to the above, please also merge-quarterly.

Committer: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext as cacti has built-in support for gettext.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.26/
